json-formatter.instructions: Pega tu texto JSON en el área de entrada y haz clic en Formatear para embellecerlo.

base64.input_placeholder: Ingresa texto para codificar o cadena Base64 para decodificar...
base64.instructions: Ingresa texto y haz clic en Codificar para convertir a Base64, o pega una cadena Base64 y haz clic en Decodificar para revertir. Activa el modo URL seguro para codificación compatible con URL.

word-counter.input_placeholder: Escribe o pega tu texto aquí...
word-counter.instructions: Escribe o pega tu texto para ver estadísticas en tiempo real.

url-encoder.input_placeholder: Ingresa texto para codificar o cadena codificada para decodificar...
url-encoder.instructions: Ingresa texto y haz clic en Codificar para codificar la URL, o pega una cadena codificada y haz clic en Decodificar. Elige entre los modos encodeURIComponent y encodeURI.

timestamp.instructions: Convierte entre marcas de tiempo Unix y fechas legibles. La marca de tiempo actual se actualiza en tiempo real.

json-minify.instructions: Pega JSON y haz clic en Minificar para comprimir, Escapar para escapar caracteres especiales, o Desescapar para revertir.

uuid-generator.instructions: Genera identificadores UUID v4. Elige cantidad y formato, luego haz clic en Generar.

hash-calculator.instructions: Ingresa texto y selecciona algoritmos de hash. Los resultados se actualizan en tiempo real.

color-converter.instructions: Elige un color o ingresa un valor HEX para ver todas las conversiones de formato.

radix-converter.error_invalid: Entrada inválida para la base seleccionada
radix-converter.instructions: Ingresa un número y selecciona su base. Las cuatro conversiones de base se muestran simultáneamente.

case-converter.instructions: Ingresa texto y selecciona un modo de conversión. El resultado se actualiza en tiempo real.

password-generator.instructions: Configura las opciones de contraseña y haz clic en Generar. Usa el indicador de fortaleza para evaluar la seguridad.

json-sort.instructions: Pega un objeto JSON y haz clic en Ordenar para ordenar las claves alfabéticamente. El orden de los arrays se preserva.

regex-tester.instructions: Ingresa un patrón regex y texto de prueba. Las coincidencias se resaltan en tiempo real. Activa las banderas según sea necesario.

json-converter.instructions: Selecciona los formatos de origen y destino, pega tus datos y haz clic en Convertir.

json-to-class.instructions: Pega datos JSON, selecciona un lenguaje de destino y nombre de clase raíz, luego haz clic en Generar.

jwt-decoder.instructions: Pega un token JWT y haz clic en Decodificar para ver su encabezado, carga útil y firma. Las marcas de tiempo se muestran como fechas legibles.

json-schema.instructions: Pega datos JSON y haz clic en Generar Schema para crear un JSON Schema (Draft-07).

qrcode.text_placeholder: Ingresa texto o URL para codificar...
qrcode.coming_soon: La generación de códigos QR requiere una biblioteca. ¡Próximamente!
qrcode.instructions: Ingresa texto o una URL para generar un código QR. Personaliza el tamaño y los colores.

unicode-converter.input_placeholder: Ingresa texto o secuencias de escape Unicode...
unicode-converter.instructions: Convierte texto a secuencias de escape Unicode (\uXXXX) o decodifica Unicode a texto.

symmetric-cipher.input_placeholder: Ingresa texto para cifrar o texto cifrado para descifrar...
symmetric-cipher.instructions: Cifra texto usando AES-CBC o descifra texto cifrado con la misma contraseña.

html-escape.instructions: Escapa caracteres especiales HTML a entidades o desescápalos.

file-base64.drop_label: Drop a file here or click to browse
file-base64.instructions: Upload a file to get its Base64 and Data URI, or paste Base64 to download as a file.

text-dedup.instructions: Paste text and remove duplicate lines. Toggle case sensitivity as needed.

text-sort.instructions: Paste text and sort lines by different criteria.

text-trim.instructions: Clean up text by removing empty lines, trimming whitespace, or joining lines.

naming-converter.instructions: Enter a variable name to see all naming convention conversions in real-time.

js-formatter.instructions: Paste JS/HTML code and click Beautify to format or Minify to compress.

css-formatter.instructions: Paste CSS code and click Beautify to format or Minify to compress.

sql-formatter.instructions: Paste SQL and click Format to uppercase keywords and indent, or Minify to compress.

xml-formatter.instructions: Paste XML and click Format to indent or Minify to compress.

properties-yaml.instructions: Convert between .properties and YAML formats. Nested keys are supported.

json-to-sql.input_placeholder: Paste a JSON array of objects...
json-to-sql.instructions: Paste a JSON array and specify a table name to generate SQL INSERT statements.

diff-viewer.instructions: Paste two texts to compare them side by side with color-coded differences.

markdown-editor.instructions: Write Markdown on the left and see the rendered preview on the right.

cron-generator.instructions: Build a cron expression by editing fields or typing directly. See human-readable description and next run times.

unit-converter.instructions: Select a category, enter a value, and choose units to convert between.

filesize-converter.instructions: Enter a file size value and unit to see conversions in both decimal and binary systems.

random-number.instructions: Set range and count, then generate random integers or floating-point numbers.

php-serialize.input_placeholder: Paste JSON or PHP serialized data...
php-serialize.instructions: Convert JSON to PHP serialized format or unserialize PHP data back to JSON.

css-gradient.instructions: Create CSS gradients with visual controls. Adjust type, angle, and color stops.

css-bezier.instructions: Edit cubic-bezier curves for CSS animations. Use presets or drag sliders.

css-flex.instructions: Edit Flexbox layout properties visually. See live preview of the layout.

css-glassmorphism.instructions: Create glassmorphism effects. Adjust blur, opacity, and background color.

css-neumorphism.instructions: Create neumorphism effects. Adjust shadow distance, blur, intensity, and shape.

css-border-radius.instructions: Edit CSS border-radius with independent corner controls.

px-converter.instructions: Convert between CSS units. Set a custom base font size for em/rem calculations.

gradient-collection.instructions: Browse 100+ preset gradients. Click to select and copy the CSS.

color-palette.instructions: Pick a base color and select a harmony rule to generate a color palette.

traditional-colors.instructions: Browse Chinese and Japanese traditional colors. Click a color to see details.

image-crop.instructions: Upload an image and set crop dimensions to crop it.
image-crop.drop_label: Drop an image here or click to browse

image-compress.instructions: Upload an image and adjust quality to compress it.
image-compress.drop_label: Drop an image here or click to browse

image-converter.instructions: Upload an image and select a target format to convert and download.
image-converter.drop_label: Drop an image here or click to browse

image-resize.instructions: Upload an image and set new dimensions to resize it.
image-resize.drop_label: Drop an image here or click to browse

curl-converter.instructions: Paste a curl command and select a target language to generate code.

url-parser.instructions: Enter a URL to parse it into its components.

browser-info.instructions: View your browser and device information detected automatically.

meta-generator.instructions: Fill in the fields to generate HTML meta tags for SEO.

htaccess-nginx.instructions: Paste Apache .htaccess rules to convert them to Nginx configuration.

html-to-markdown.instructions: Paste HTML and convert it to Markdown format.

pinyin.instructions: Enter Chinese characters to convert them to pinyin.

simplified-traditional.instructions: Convert between Simplified and Traditional Chinese characters.

number-to-chinese.instructions: Enter a number to convert it to Chinese characters.

image-base64.instructions: Upload an image to get its Base64 and Data URI.
image-base64.drop_label: Drop an image here or click to browse

csv-to-json.instructions: Paste CSV data and convert it to JSON format.

time-converter.instructions: Enter a date/time string to see it in multiple formats.

image-to-pdf.requires_library: This feature requires the jspdf library.

pdf-to-image.requires_library: This feature requires the pdf.js library.

image-to-svg.requires_library: This feature requires the potrace library.

html-strip.instructions: Paste HTML and strip all tags to get plain text.

auto-typeset.instructions: Paste text to automatically add spaces between CJK and Latin characters.

text-filter.instructions: Paste text and toggle which character types to keep.

python-formatter.instructions: Paste Python code to format its indentation.

java-formatter.instructions: Paste Java code to format its indentation.

php-formatter.instructions: Paste PHP code to format its indentation.

subnet-calculator.instructions: View the CIDR to subnet mask conversion table.

color-schemes.instructions: Browse 50+ preset color schemes for web design. Click to select.

barcode.instructions: Enter text to generate a Code128 barcode.

chart-generator.instructions: Enter data as label,value pairs (one per line) to generate a chart.

keycode.instructions: Press any key to see its event properties in real-time.

shield-badge.instructions: Configure and generate GitHub-style shield badges.

gif-maker.requires_library: This feature requires the gif.js library.

json-tree.instructions: Paste JSON and click Parse to view as a collapsible tree.

json-random.instructions: Configure depth and fields, then generate random JSON.

json-cleaner.instructions: Paste dirty JSON to remove comments, trailing commas, and fix quotes.
json-cleaner.input_placeholder: Paste JSON with comments or trailing commas...

json-querystring.instructions: Convert between JSON objects and URL query strings.

json-highlight.instructions: Paste JSON to see syntax-highlighted output.

json-editor.instructions: Edit JSON with format, minify, and validate features.

base32-encoder.instructions: Encode and decode text using Base32, Base58, or Base62.

bcrypt-tool.instructions: Generate bcrypt hashes or verify passwords against hashes.

morse-code.instructions: Convert between text and Morse code.

gzip-tool.instructions: Compress text with Gzip or decompress Base64-encoded Gzip data.
gzip-tool.input_placeholder: Enter text or Base64 gzip data...

htpasswd-gen.instructions: Generate htpasswd entries for Apache authentication.

file-hash.instructions: Upload a file to calculate its SHA hashes.
file-hash.drop_label: Drop a file here or click to browse

native-ascii.instructions: Convert between native characters and \uXXXX ASCII.

rsa-tool.instructions: Generate RSA key pairs and encrypt/decrypt text.

hex-url.instructions: Encode text to URL hex format or decode back.

utf8-tool.instructions: View UTF-8 byte sequences of text.

email-encode.instructions: Encode email addresses to prevent scraping.

cert-gen.requires_library: This feature requires a crypto library.

scrypt-tool.requires_library: This feature requires a scrypt library.

cookie-formatter.instructions: Parse cookie strings into a key-value table.

header-formatter.instructions: Parse HTTP headers into a key-value table.

url-params.instructions: Parse URL query parameters into an editable table.

c-formatter.instructions: Basic C/C# code formatting with indentation.

sql-quotes.instructions: Add or remove double quotes around SQL identifiers.

hex-text.instructions: Convert between hex strings and text.

fullwidth-halfwidth.instructions: Convert between fullwidth and halfwidth characters.

geo-coords.instructions: Convert between WGS-84, GCJ-02, and BD-09 coordinates.

dms-converter.instructions: Convert between decimal degrees and DMS format.

short-url.instructions: Simulate short URL encoding using Base62.

html-ubb.instructions: Convert between HTML and BBCode/UBB format.

doc-to-pdf.requires_library: This feature requires a PDF library.

si-units.instructions: Convert between SI units for force, energy, frequency, and pressure.

ip-to-int.instructions: Convert between IPv4 addresses and integers.

matrix-json.instructions: Convert between matrix text and JSON 2D arrays.

cookie-to-js.instructions: Convert cookie strings to JavaScript document.cookie code.

richtext-markdown.instructions: Convert rich text HTML to Markdown format.

pdf-compress.requires_library: This feature requires a PDF library.

pdf-editor.requires_library: This feature requires a PDF library.

php-session.instructions: Parse PHP session data into JSON.

currency-uppercase.instructions: Convert numbers to multi-currency uppercase format.

thunder-url.instructions: Decode Thunder/FlashGet URLs or encode to Thunder format.

torrent-magnet.requires_library: This feature requires a torrent parser.

html-js-convert.instructions: Convert between HTML and JavaScript string format.

lunar-calendar.instructions: Convert between Gregorian and Chinese Lunar calendar.

php-session-data.instructions: Parse and convert PHP session data.

text-reverse.instructions: Reverse text characters or line order.

text-find-replace.instructions: Find and replace text with optional regex support.

line-numbers.instructions: Add or remove line numbers from text.

string-count.instructions: Count occurrences of a string in text.

number-sum.instructions: Enter numbers (one per line) to calculate their sum.

text-shuffle.instructions: Randomly shuffle the order of lines.

sequence-gen.instructions: Generate a sequence of numbers with prefix/suffix.

vertical-text.instructions: Convert horizontal text to vertical layout.

text-spacer.instructions: Insert a character between each character of the text.

text-column.instructions: Extract a specific column from delimited text.

text-length-filter.instructions: Filter text lines by character length.

hanzi-stroke.instructions: Look up stroke order for Chinese characters.

errors.not_found_description: La página que buscas no existe.
errors.tool_error: Se produjo un error en esta herramienta.
